upper.title: Distancing: Expressions and passive of reporting verbs
upper.content:
📌 Distancing là gì? Tại sao dùng?
Distancing là cách diễn đạt để tạo khoảng cách giữa người nói và thông tin, nhằm:
✦ Giảm trách nhiệm về độ chính xác của thông tin
✦ Thể hiện sự khách quan, trung lập (báo chí, học thuật)
✦ Làm nhẹ bớt nhận xét hoặc chỉ trích
✦ Thể hiện sự lịch sự, tế nhị

Ví dụ:
It would seem that the project is behind schedule. (Lịch sự hơn so với 'The project is behind schedule')
The patient appears to be recovering well. (Khách quan, dè dặt)
📌 Các cấu trúc Distancing thông dụng
Cấu trúcVí dụ
It would seem / appear that…It would seem that nobody was home at the time.
Subject + would seem/appear + to VThe results would appear to show a significant improvement.
Subject + tend(s) to VPeople tend to forget how difficult it was.
Subject + be likely/unlikely + to VThe meeting is likely to be postponed.
It is likely/unlikely that…It is unlikely that they will arrive on time.
Modal verbs for distancing: may/might/couldThere may be some delays due to the weather.
📌 Passive of Reporting Verbs – Ôn tập và mở rộng (B2)
Dùng để tường thuật thông tin một cách khách quan, thường gặp trong báo chí và văn phong trang trọng.

Cấu trúc 1: It + passive verb + that + S + V
It is said that the company is in financial trouble.

Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive verb + to + V
The company is said to be in financial trouble.

Các động từ thông dụng: say, believe, think, report, consider, expect, know, claim, understand, allege, estimate, rumour, suppose, fear

Các dạng infinitive:
✦ Đồng thời: to + V
✦ Đang diễn ra: to be + V-ing
✦ Quá khứ: to have + V3
✦ Bị động: to be + V3 / to have been + V3
📌 So sánh các mức độ Distancing
Mức độCấu trúcVí dụ
Chắc chắnknow, be certainHe is known to be the best in his field.
Khả năng caobe likely, seem, appearIt is likely to rain this afternoon.
Khả năng vừamay, might, couldThe flight might be delayed.
Không chắc chắnunlikely, doubtIt is unlikely that he will agree.
It would appear that the data has been tampered with.Distancing: It would appear that + clause
The research tends to suggest a strong correlation between the two variables.Distancing: subject + tends to + V
The escaped prisoner is believed to be hiding somewhere in the mountains.Passive reporting verb + continuous infinitive

exercises.q: It ___ that the government is planning to increase taxes next year.
exercises.exp: Distancing: It would seem that + clause (tạo khoảng cách, lịch sự)

exercises.q: The new policy ___ to have been poorly received by the public.
exercises.exp: Subject + would appear + to have V3 (quá khứ, distancing)

exercises.q: People ___ to underestimate the amount of time needed for such a project.
exercises.exp: Subject + tend to V (general tendency)

exercises.q: The situation ___ to be more complicated than we initially thought.
exercises.exp: Subject + appears + to V (seems)

exercises.q: It is ___ that the team will meet the deadline despite the challenges.
exercises.exp: It is likely that + clause (khả năng cao)

exercises.q: The company ___ to be considering a merger with its main competitor.
exercises.exp: Passive reporting verb: is believed + to be V-ing (đang diễn ra)

exercises.q: It is widely ___ that climate change poses the greatest threat to our generation.
exercises.exp: It is widely thought that + clause

exercises.q: The prisoner ___ to have escaped through an underground tunnel.
exercises.exp: Subject + is thought + to have V3 (quá khứ)

exercises.q: It ___ that the company may file for bankruptcy within the next quarter.
exercises.exp: It is feared that + clause (lo ngại)

exercises.q: The stolen artwork ___ to have been smuggled out of the country.
exercises.exp: Subject + is believed + to have V3

exercises.q: There ___ to be some confusion regarding the new regulations.
exercises.exp: There appears to be (exists/seems to exist)

exercises.q: The defendant ___ to have been at the scene of the crime on the night in question.
exercises.exp: Subject + is alleged + to have V3 (bị cáo buộc)

exercises.q: It is ___ that over two million people have been affected by the floods.
exercises.exp: It is estimated that + clause (ước tính)

exercises.q: The two sides ___ to be close to reaching a historic peace agreement.
exercises.exp: Subject + are reported + to be V-ing (đưa tin)

exercises.q: It is ___ that the festival will attract over one hundred thousand visitors this year.
exercises.exp: It is expected that + clause (kỳ vọng)

exercises.q: The missing hikers ___ to have been found alive by the rescue team.
exercises.exp: Subject + are reported + to have V3 (kết quả đã biết)

exercises.q: The economy ___ to grow by at least three percent next year.
exercises.exp: Subject + is expected + to V (tương lai)

exercises.q: It ___ that the negotiations have broken down completely.
exercises.exp: It is understood that + clause (được hiểu rằng)

exercises.q: The celebrity ___ to be worth over two hundred million dollars.
exercises.exp: Subject + is said + to be (được đồn là)

exercises.q: The new drug ___ to have cured patients in all early-stage clinical trials.
exercises.exp: Subject + is claimed + to have V3 (được tuyên bố)

exercises.q: It ___ (seem) that the flight has been delayed due to bad weather.
exercises.exp: Distancing: It would seem that + clause

exercises.q: The government ___ (appear / reconsider) its position on the controversial issue.
exercises.exp: Subject + would appear + to be V-ing (đang diễn ra)

exercises.q: People ___ (tend / forget) how different life was before the internet.
exercises.exp: Subject + tend to V (xu hướng chung)

exercises.q: The meeting ___ (be likely / postpone) until next week.
exercises.exp: Subject + be likely + to be V3

exercises.q: It is ___ (unlikely / they / arrive) before midnight given the traffic.
exercises.exp: It is unlikely that + clause

exercises.q: There ___ (appear / be) some misunderstanding about the new policy.
exercises.exp: There appears to be (tồn tại, có vẻ)

exercises.q: The company ___ (say / lose) millions of dollars in the scandal.
exercises.exp: Subject + is said + to have V3 (quá khứ)

exercises.q: It ___ (believe) that the painting was stolen by an organized crime group.
exercises.exp: It is believed that + clause

exercises.q: The suspect ___ (allege / receive) payments from foreign agents.
exercises.exp: Subject + is alleged + to have V3

exercises.q: The castle ___ (say / be) haunted by the ghost of a former resident.
exercises.exp: Subject + is said + to be (đồn đại)

exercises.q: It ___ (report) that over a hundred people were injured in the explosion.
exercises.exp: It was reported that + clause (quá khứ)

exercises.q: The two leaders ___ (think / hold) secret talks in a neutral location.
exercises.exp: Subject + are thought + to be V-ing

exercises.q: The ancient temple ___ (believe / date back) to the 12th century.
exercises.exp: Subject + is believed + to V (thực tế hiện tại)

exercises.q: It ___ (estimate) that the project will cost over five billion dollars.
exercises.exp: It is estimated that + clause

exercises.q: The politician ___ (know / have) close ties to several major corporations.
exercises.exp: Subject + is known + to have V3

exercises.q: The missing documents ___ (understand / destroy) in the fire.
exercises.ans: are understood to have been destroyed
exercises.exp: Subject + are understood + to have been V3

exercises.q: It ___ (fear) that the species may become extinct within the next decade.
exercises.exp: It is feared that + clause

exercises.q: The actress ___ (rumour / star) in the upcoming blockbuster film.
exercises.ans: is rumoured to be starring / is rumoured to star
exercises.exp: Subject + is rumoured + to V / to be V-ing

exercises.q: The election ___ (expect / hold) in November as scheduled.
exercises.exp: Subject + is expected + to be V3 (tương lai bị động)

exercises.q: It ___ (claim) that the treatment has a ninety percent success rate.
exercises.exp: It is claimed that + clause

exercises.q: The earthquake ___ (estimate / cause) billions of dollars in damage.
exercises.exp: Subject + is estimated + to have V3

reorder.words: it would seem that the project is behind schedule again
the government would appear to have changed its position on immigration
people tend to underestimate the time required for complex tasks
it is believed that the suspect is hiding somewhere in the city
the company is said to be planning a major restructuring next quarter
the politician is alleged to have accepted bribes from foreign donors
it is widely thought that education is the key to economic development
the stolen painting is believed to have been smuggled out of the country
the two sides are reported to be close to signing a peace agreement
it is estimated that over five hundred people lost their jobs
the actress is rumoured to be dating a famous director
it is feared that the disease may spread to other regions
the results are unlikely to be published before the end of the year
there appears to be a mistake in the financial report
it is understood that both parties have agreed to the terms
the missing child is thought to have been taken by a family member
it is claimed that the new vaccine is ninety five percent effective
the economy is expected to recover slowly over the next two years
the ancient tomb is known to have been looted centuries ago
it is suggested that the policy change may lead to higher unemployment
the injured patients are reported to have been taken to three different hospitals
it was alleged that the official had been involved in corruption for years

passage.text: A new study on the long-term effects of remote working {{1}} to have produced some surprising results. {{2}} that employees who work from home are, on average, fifteen percent more productive than those in traditional offices. However, {{3}} that long-term isolation can have serious consequences for mental health. The lead researcher {{4}} to have spent over five years collecting data from forty thousand participants across fifteen countries. It {{5}} that companies should consider hybrid working models as a compromise. Several major corporations {{6}} to be reviewing their working-from-home policies in light of the findings. {{7}} that governments around the world will take note of the study when designing future employment regulations. The study's conclusions {{8}} to have significant implications for how we think about the future of work. {{9}} that a follow-up study will be published within the next eighteen months. The results of the initial research {{10}} to have already been presented to several parliamentary committees.

A major archaeological discovery {{1}} to have been made in the jungles of Central America. A team of researchers {{2}} to have uncovered the remains of a previously unknown Maya city. {{3}} that the settlement dates back to at least 600 AD and {{4}} to have been home to over fifty thousand people at its peak. The site {{5}} to have been hidden beneath dense vegetation for centuries, protected by its remote location. {{6}} that the city was abandoned long before the arrival of European explorers, possibly due to drought or disease. The lead archaeologist {{7}} to be cautiously optimistic about what further excavations may reveal. {{8}} that the discovery will transform our understanding of Maya civilisation. {{9}} that a documentary about the find is already being produced by a major television network. The site {{10}} to be at risk from looting if it becomes widely known.

A controversial new law {{1}} to be passed within the coming weeks, according to political insiders. {{2}} that the legislation will introduce strict new controls on data collection by technology companies. Critics, however, {{3}} to have raised serious concerns about the law's impact on innovation. The technology industry {{4}} to be planning a coordinated campaign against the legislation. {{5}} that several major companies have already threatened to relocate their European headquarters if the law is passed. {{6}} that the government introduced the law in response to growing public concern about privacy. Supporters of the bill {{7}} to be confident that it will withstand any legal challenges. {{8}} that the law could set a precedent for other countries considering similar measures. It {{9}} that a vote will take place in parliament next Tuesday. The outcome {{10}} to be too close to call at this stage.

A prominent scientist {{1}} to have made a breakthrough in fusion energy research. {{2}} that the scientist's team has successfully sustained a fusion reaction for over five minutes, a world record. If confirmed, the achievement {{3}} to represent a major step toward clean, unlimited energy. However, some experts {{4}} to have expressed caution, noting that previous claims in this field have proven premature. {{5}} that the scientist has been working on the project in secret for over a decade. The research {{6}} to have been funded by a combination of government grants and private investment. {{7}} that a full peer-reviewed paper will be published within the next six months. The findings {{8}} to have enormous implications for the fight against climate change. {{9}} that several energy companies have already expressed interest in the technology. It {{10}} to be too early to say whether this breakthrough will lead to commercial applications.

The financial markets {{1}} to be reacting nervously to the announcement of new trade restrictions. {{2}} that the measures could reduce international trade by as much as ten percent. Analysts {{3}} to be divided on the likely impact of the policy. Some {{4}} to have warned of a possible recession, while others {{5}} to believe the effects will be short-lived. {{6}} that emergency meetings are being held between finance ministers from the affected countries. The central bank {{7}} to be preparing to intervene if the markets continue to fall. {{8}} that a formal response from the government is expected within forty-eight hours. It {{9}} that the trade restrictions were introduced in response to unfair trading practices by foreign competitors. The situation {{10}} to be highly unpredictable, and investors are advised to exercise caution.

An anonymous artist known only as 'The Shadow' {{1}} to have been creating large-scale murals in cities around the world for over a decade. {{2}} that no one has ever seen the artist at work, as all pieces are created under cover of darkness. The artist {{3}} to travel with a team of assistants who help prepare the walls in advance. {{4}} that The Shadow studied at a prestigious art school before disappearing from the conventional art world entirely. Some of the murals {{5}} to have been sold for hundreds of thousands of dollars by building owners who preserved them after their creation. {{6}} that the artist's true identity is known to fewer than five people. The work {{7}} to be inspired by themes of social justice and environmental activism. {{8}} that a major gallery has offered The Shadow a solo exhibition, but the offer {{9}} to have been declined. The mysterious artist {{10}} to be currently working on the largest piece yet, somewhere in East Asia.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một bài báo ngắn (trên 40 từ) về một sự kiện gây tranh cãi gần đây - sử dụng các cấu trúc distancing và passive reporting verbs để bày tỏ thông tin một cách khách quan, cho thấy bạn không hoàn toàn chắc chắn về độ chính xác của thông tin. Sử dụng nhiều cấu trúc khác nhau như It is claimed that..., Subject is believed to..., It would seem that..., Subject appears to...
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Distancing: It would seem/appear; Passive reporting verbs; It is said/believed/reported/thought/claimed that; Subject + verb + to V
writing_prompts.example: It is reported that the technology giant is planning to acquire its main competitor for a record-breaking sum. The deal is believed to be worth over fifty billion dollars, though neither company has officially confirmed this. It would seem that the acquisition is part of a broader strategy to dominate the artificial intelligence market. The CEO is said to have been in secret negotiations for the past six months. It is feared that the merger could lead to thousands of job losses, though the company claims that it expects to create new roles in emerging areas.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy tưởng tượng bạn là một phóng viên điều tra viết về một bí ẩn chưa có lời giải - sử dụng các cấu trúc distancing để thể hiện rằng nhiều thông tin vẫn chưa được xác nhận. Kết hợp It is believed that..., Subject is rumoured to..., It would appear that..., There seems to be... Viết tối thiểu 40 từ.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Distancing structures for unconfirmed information
writing_prompts.example: The disappearance of the renowned art collector has baffled investigators for months. It is believed that he vanished from his private villa during the night, taking nothing with him. It would appear that he had been planning his disappearance for some time, as his most valuable paintings are thought to have been removed days before he left. He is rumoured to have been under significant financial pressure, though this has not been confirmed. The police are said to be exploring the possibility that the collector staged his own disappearance, but it is understood that they have not ruled out foul play either.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn (trên 40 từ) phân tích một xu hướng xã hội hoặc kinh tế - sử dụng các cấu trúc distancing để đưa ra nhận định một cách thận trọng. Sử dụng It would seem that..., Subject tends to..., It appears that..., Subject is likely to..., It is thought that... để thể hiện các mức độ chắc chắn khác nhau.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Distancing with tend to, likely/unlikely, appear/seem, passive reporting verbs
writing_prompts.example: Young people tend to change jobs more frequently than previous generations, and it would seem that this trend is accelerating. The traditional model of staying with one employer for decades appears to be fading away. It is widely believed that this shift has been driven by a combination of factors, including technological change, the rise of the gig economy, and a greater emphasis on work-life balance. Workers under thirty are considered to be far more willing to take risks in their careers than their parents were. However, it is thought that this approach may come with significant costs, including less job security and reduced pension benefits in the long term.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một phát minh khoa học hoặc bước đột phá y học gây tranh cãi - sử dụng passive reporting verbs (is claimed to, is believed to, is reported to, it is feared that) và các cấu trúc distancing như there appears to be, it would seem that. Viết tối thiểu 40 từ, thể hiện sự khác biệt giữa người ủng hộ và người phản đối phát minh này.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive reporting verbs with varying degrees of certainty; Distancing expressions
writing_prompts.example: A revolutionary gene-editing technique is claimed to have successfully treated a previously incurable genetic disorder in several patients. The research team is believed to have been working on the therapy for over fifteen years, and the results are reported to be remarkable. However, it is feared that the same technology could be misused for non-therapeutic purposes, such as enhancing physical or cognitive abilities in healthy individuals. There appears to be significant disagreement within the scientific community about how the research should proceed. The technique is considered to be one of the most powerful tools ever developed, but it is thought to pose serious ethical questions that society has not yet fully addressed.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một vụ bê bối chính trị hoặc tài chính (trên 40 từ) - sử dụng các cấu trúc bị động của reporting verbs (is alleged to, it is understood that, is said to have, it is claimed that, are thought to be) để tường thuật các thông tin chưa được xác nhận một cách khách quan và thận trọng.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive reporting verbs for scandals; Distancing expressions
writing_prompts.example: A senior government official is alleged to have accepted payments from a foreign corporation in exchange for favourable policy decisions. The payments are said to have been made through a complex network of shell companies over a period of several years. It is understood that an internal investigation has been launched, though the details remain confidential. The official is thought to have accumulated significant wealth during the period in question, far exceeding what would be expected from a government salary alone. It is claimed that at least three other officials may have been involved, and it is reported that a formal criminal investigation is likely to be announced within the coming days. The prime minister is expected to make a statement on the matter later today.

upper.title: Passive verbs with two objects
upper.content:
📌 Động từ có hai tân ngữ – Cấu trúc đặc biệt trong bị động
Nhiều động từ trong tiếng Anh có thể đi với hai tân ngữ: một tân ngữ gián tiếp (thường là người) và một tân ngữ trực tiếp (thường là vật).

Các động từ phổ biến: give, send, show, tell, offer, promise, teach, lend, award, hand, pass, post, bring, buy, sell, write, pay, grant, deny, refuse, assign, feed, throw, make, get, find

Cấu trúc chủ động:
Subject + V + Indirect Object + Direct Object
She gave him (IO) a present (DO).

Subject + V + Direct Object + preposition + Indirect Object
She gave a present to him.
📌 Hai cách chuyển sang bị động
Vì có hai tân ngữ nên mỗi tân ngữ có thể làm chủ ngữ trong câu bị động.

Cách 1: Tân ngữ gián tiếp (người) làm chủ ngữ
Active: They offered the employees a pay rise.
Passive: The employees were offered a pay rise.

Cách 2: Tân ngữ trực tiếp (vật) làm chủ ngữ
Active: They offered a pay rise to the employees.
Passive: A pay rise was offered to the employees.

⚠️ Cách 1 (người làm chủ ngữ) phổ biến hơn trong tiếng Anh tự nhiên.
📌 Bảng động từ + giới từ trong bị động
Động từGiới từVí dụ bị động
give, offer, send, pass, hand, sell, lend, pay, award, granttoA scholarship was awarded to the best student.
buy, get, make, find, build, order, cook, fetchforA new bike was bought for her birthday.
📌 Lưu ý quan trọng
✦ Một số động từ NHẤT ĐỊNH phải dùng to khi tân ngữ gián tiếp đứng cuối: explain, describe, announce, mention, introduce, suggest, propose, repeat, say, report. Các động từ này KHÔNG có cấu trúc V + IO + DO.
✅ He explained the problem to me.
❌ He explained me the problem.

✦ Khi chuyển sang bị động, các động từ này CHỈ có một cách:
The problem was explained to me.
✅ I was explained the problem. (SAI)

✦ Một số động từ khác có thể dùng với for hoặc to tùy ý nghĩa:
She bought a gift for her mother. / She bought her mother a gift.
I made coffee for everyone. / I made everyone coffee.
The employees were offered a generous severance package.Bị động với tân ngữ gián tiếp làm chủ ngữ (phổ biến hơn)
A full refund was promised to all affected customers.Bị động với tân ngữ trực tiếp làm chủ ngữ + to
The new system was explained to the staff in a series of training sessions.Bị động với 'explain' (bắt buộc dùng to)

exercises.q: The employees ___ a significant pay rise at the end of the year.
exercises.exp: Tân ngữ gián tiếp (employees) làm chủ ngữ → were + V3

exercises.q: A full scholarship ___ to the most outstanding student in the class.
exercises.exp: Tân ngữ trực tiếp (scholarship) làm chủ ngữ → was awarded + to

exercises.q: The children ___ a bedtime story every night by their grandmother.
exercises.exp: Người làm chủ ngữ → are read + DO

exercises.q: All passengers ___ a complimentary drink during the flight.
exercises.exp: Passengers (người) → were offered

exercises.q: The new policy ___ to all employees at yesterday's meeting.
exercises.exp: Explain bắt buộc dùng 'to' trong bị động

exercises.q: The hostages ___ food and water twice a day during their captivity.
exercises.exp: Hostages (người) → were given

exercises.q: A special award ___ to the team that completed the project first.
exercises.exp: Award (vật) làm chủ ngữ → was granted + to

exercises.q: She ___ a beautiful bouquet of flowers on her retirement day.
exercises.exp: She (người) làm chủ ngữ → was presented + DO

exercises.q: The details of the contract ___ to the client before signing.
exercises.exp: Details (vật) → were sent + to

exercises.q: All students ___ access to the online learning platform free of charge.
exercises.opts: have been given,has been given,have given,are giving
exercises.exp: Present Perfect bị động: have been given

exercises.q: The proposal ___ to the board of directors for their consideration.
exercises.exp: Proposal (vật) → was submitted + to

exercises.q: Every new employee ___ a comprehensive training manual on their first day.
exercises.exp: Present Simple bị động: is given (mỗi nhân viên)

exercises.q: The winning team ___ a trophy and a cash prize of ten thousand dollars.
exercises.exp: Team (người) → was awarded + hai tân ngữ

exercises.q: The changes ___ to the staff in a series of workshops.
exercises.exp: Giống như explain → bắt buộc dùng to

exercises.q: The refugees ___ temporary shelter and medical care by the aid organisation.
exercises.exp: Refugees (người) → were provided + with DO

exercises.q: A substantial discount ___ to customers who pay in advance.
exercises.exp: Present Simple bị động: is offered + to

exercises.q: The audience ___ the opportunity to ask questions after the presentation.
exercises.opts: was given,were given,has been given,are given
exercises.exp: Audience (người) → was/were given + DO

exercises.q: The new regulations ___ to all members of the association last week.
exercises.exp: Regulations (vật) → were sent + to

exercises.q: The applicant ___ the job because of his lack of experience.
exercises.exp: Applicant (người) → was denied + DO

exercises.q: The research findings ___ to the scientific community at the international conference.
exercises.exp: Findings (vật) → were presented + to

exercises.q: The employees ___ (offer) a bonus if they meet their targets.
exercises.exp: Tương lai bị động: will be offered + DO

exercises.q: The students ___ (teach) how to analyse primary sources in their history class.
exercises.exp: Present Simple bị động: are taught

exercises.q: A generous donation ___ (give) to the charity by an anonymous donor.
exercises.exp: Vật làm chủ ngữ: was given + to

exercises.q: The accident victims ___ (rush) to the nearest hospital immediately.
exercises.exp: Victims (người) → were rushed + to (place)

exercises.q: The procedure ___ (explain) to the patient before the operation.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một buổi lễ trao giải hoặc sự kiện chính thức (trên 40 từ) - tập trung vào việc sử dụng cấu trúc bị động với hai tân ngữ (were awarded, was presented with, were given, was offered) để mô tả ai đã được trao giải thưởng, chứng nhận hoặc cơ hội gì tại sự kiện đó. Cố gắng sử dụng cả hai cách chuyển đổi bị động (người làm chủ ngữ và vật làm chủ ngữ + giới từ).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive with two objects: Person as subject and Thing as subject + preposition
writing_prompts.example: At the annual industry awards ceremony last night, some of the most talented professionals in the field were recognised for their outstanding achievements. The top prize was awarded to a young architect who designed an innovative eco-friendly housing complex. She was presented with a trophy and a cheque for one hundred thousand dollars by the president of the association. The runners-up were given special certificates of excellence and offered mentorship opportunities with leading firms. The audience was told about each project in detail, and the remarkable stories behind them were explained to everyone present. A special lifetime achievement award was granted to a veteran designer who had been working in the industry for over fifty years. Every nominee was sent a personalised letter of congratulations and provided with feedback from the judging panel.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một tình huống trong môi trường làm việc hoặc công ty - sử dụng cấu trúc bị động với hai tân ngữ để mô tả các quyết định hoặc chính sách mới ảnh hưởng đến nhân viên như thế nào. Ví dụ: nhân viên được thông báo, được hứa hẹn, được đề nghị, được giải thích điều gì đó.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive with two objects in workplace context
writing_prompts.example: Last month, the employees of a local manufacturing company were told that the factory would be modernised with new automated equipment. The management team was given the task of implementing the changes over a six-month period. The workers were offered comprehensive retraining programmes so that they could operate the new machinery. The details of the modernisation plan were explained to all staff members in a series of meetings. Those who agreed to stay with the company during the transition were promised job security and a pay increase once the project was completed. A special bonus was awarded to the team that adapted fastest to the new technology. The older employees, who were initially concerned about the changes, were provided with additional support and mentoring throughout the process.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) một tình huống trong trường học hoặc lớp học - sử dụng bị động với hai tân ngữ để mô tả những gì học sinh được dạy, được cho, được thông báo, được giải thích. Cố gắng đa dạng hóa các động từ: teach, give, tell, explain, show, offer, assign, grant.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive with two objects in educational context
writing_prompts.example: During the first week of the new academic year, the students were taught a variety of essential skills that would serve them throughout their studies. They were given detailed timetables and course materials on the very first day. The school's new behaviour policy was explained to all students in an assembly, and the consequences of breaking the rules were made very clear. The most important library resources were shown to each class during a guided tour. Students who demonstrated exceptional ability in specific subjects were offered places in advanced programmes. Every student was assigned a personal tutor who would monitor their progress and provide academic guidance. Those who needed additional support were granted extra time with specialist teachers, and all students were provided with access to an online learning platform where they could review lessons at their own pace.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một tình huống trong bệnh viện hoặc tình huống khẩn cấp - sử dụng bị động với hai tân ngữ để mô tả những gì bệnh nhân, nạn nhân hoặc nhân viên y tế được cung cấp, được cho, được thông báo. Sử dụng các động từ như give, offer, tell, provide, grant, show, promise.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive with two objects in medical/emergency context
writing_prompts.example: When the ambulance arrived at the scene of the accident, the injured passengers were given immediate first aid by the paramedics. The most critically injured patients were rushed to the nearest hospital, where they were offered emergency surgery without any delay. The relatives of the victims were told about the condition of their loved ones as soon as the medical team had completed their assessments. The treatment options for each patient were explained in detail by the attending doctors. All survivors were provided with psychological support services to help them cope with the trauma of the accident. Those who had lost their belongings in the crash were given emergency supplies and temporary identification documents. The hospital staff were granted extra resources to handle the sudden influx of patients, and the entire community was promised that a full investigation into the cause of the accident would be conducted.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) một tình huống trong lễ hội hoặc sự kiện văn hóa - sử dụng cấu trúc bị động với hai tân ngữ để mô tả những gì người tham dự được cung cấp, được tặng, được thông báo hoặc được trao. Sử dụng cả hai dạng: người làm chủ ngữ và vật làm chủ ngữ + giới từ (to/for).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive with two objects in cultural/festival context
writing_prompts.example: At the opening ceremony of the international film festival, the guests were given VIP welcome packages containing programmes and exclusive merchandise. The audience was shown a stunning collection of short films from emerging directors around the world. The competition rules were explained to all participating filmmakers in detail before the screenings began. The winners of the main categories were awarded prestigious golden statuettes and substantial cash prizes by a jury of acclaimed directors. The audience was offered the opportunity to ask questions during Q&A sessions with the filmmakers after each screening. All festival attendees were provided with complimentary refreshments and access to exclusive networking events. The local community was granted free entry to certain screenings, and the entire event was broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide through the festival's online streaming platform.

upper.title: Verb + object + infinitive/gerund: Verb patterns
upper.content:
📌 Giới thiệu Verb Patterns với tân ngữ
Ở trình độ B2, chúng ta học cách sử dụng các động từ đi kèm với tân ngữ + động từ nguyên mẫu (infinitive) hoặc tân ngữ + V-ing (gerund). Đây là những cấu trúc quan trọng giúp diễn đạt ý một cách chính xác và tự nhiên.

Hai cấu trúc chính:
✦ Verb + object + to + infinitive
✦ Verb + object + V-ing / bare infinitive
📌 Verb + Object + To-Infinitive
Động từ chỉ yêu cầu / cho phép / khuyên bảo / ép buộc / ra lệnh:
ask, tell, advise, encourage, invite, order, persuade, remind, warn, force, require, allow, permit, forbid, urge, enable, cause, motivate, challenge, hire, instruct, teach, trust, expect, want, would like, need, beg, command, direct

Ví dụ:
She advised me to apply for the scholarship.
The teacher encouraged her students to participate in the competition.
They warned us not to travel during the storm.
The manager forced him to resign from his position.
I would like you to review this document.
📌 Verb + Object + V-ing (Gerund)
Động từ chỉ cảm nhận / phát hiện / ngăn cản / thích / không thích:
see, watch, hear, notice, observe, find, catch, smell, feel, prevent, stop, keep, spend, waste, imagine, picture, remember, report, risk, mind, suggest

Ví dụ:
I saw him leaving the building late last night.
The police caught the thief stealing a purse.
Nothing can stop me achieving my goals.
I can't imagine him living in such a remote place.
We spent the whole afternoon discussing the plan.
📌 Verb + Object + Bare Infinitive (Không To)
Động từ chỉ giác quan và một số trường hợp đặc biệt:
see, watch, hear, notice, observe, feel, make, let, have, help (có thể có hoặc không to)

I heard her sing at the concert last night. (cảm nhận toàn bộ hành động)
I heard her singing in the shower. (đang diễn ra, một phần)
She made me apologise for my mistake.
Let me know if you need anything.
Can you help me (to) carry these boxes?
📌 So sánh: To-infinitive vs V-ing sau tân ngữ
Động từ+ Object + to V+ Object + V-ing
see / hear / watch / notice / feelToàn bộ hành động: I saw him cross the road.Hành động đang diễn ra: I saw him crossing the road.
find—They found the child hiding in the cupboard.
catch—I caught him reading my diary.
helpShe helped me (to) finish the project.—
make / letShe made me wait. (bare inf.)—
The doctor advised him to take more exercise and eat a healthier diet.Verb + object + to-infinitive (khuyên bảo)
I heard someone shouting for help in the distance.Verb of perception + object + V-ing (đang diễn ra)
Nothing can prevent us achieving our goals if we work hard enough.Verb + object + V-ing (ngăn cản)

exercises.exp: Imagine + object + V-ing (tưởng tượng ai đó đang làm gì)

exercises.q: The storm prevented the plane ___ on time.

exercises.exp: Prevent + object + from + V-ing (ngăn cản)

exercises.q: I heard her ___ beautifully at the concert last night.
exercises.exp: Hear + object + bare inf (nghe trọn vẹn màn trình diễn). 'Singing' cũng đúng nếu nhấn mạnh đang diễn ra

exercises.q: The teacher reminded the students ___ their homework before Friday.
exercises.exp: Remind + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: Can you help me ___ these boxes upstairs?
exercises.exp: Help + object + (to) V (có thể có hoặc không to)

exercises.q: They found the missing child ___ in an old shed at the edge of the forest.
exercises.exp: Find + object + V-ing (phát hiện ai đó đang làm gì)

exercises.q: My parents never let me ___ out past ten o'clock when I was young.
exercises.exp: Let + object + bare infinitive (cho phép)

exercises.q: The manager advised the team ___ (accept) the new terms of the contract.
exercises.exp: Advise + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I saw a young man ___ (run) across the street and jump into a taxi.
exercises.exp: See + object + bare inf (toàn bộ hành động)

exercises.q: The teacher encouraged all students ___ (participate) in the debate competition.
exercises.exp: Encourage + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: She made her son ___ (apologise) for breaking the neighbour's window.
exercises.exp: Make + object + bare infinitive (không to)

exercises.q: We caught the teenagers ___ (try) to sneak into the cinema without paying.
exercises.exp: Catch + object + V-ing (bắt quả tang)

exercises.q: Nothing can prevent us ___ (achieve) our long-term goals.
exercises.exp: Prevent + object + from + V-ing

exercises.q: The government urged citizens ___ (conserve) water during the drought.
exercises.exp: Urge + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I can't imagine her ___ (live) in such a remote area without any neighbours.
exercises.exp: Imagine + object + V-ing

exercises.q: The police warned everyone ___ (not / approach) the abandoned building.
exercises.exp: Warn + object + not to-infinitive

exercises.q: Let me ___ (know) if you need any further assistance.
exercises.exp: Let + object + bare infinitive

exercises.q: We spent the whole morning ___ (discuss) the proposal for the new project.
exercises.exp: Spend + time + V-ing

exercises.q: The organisation assists refugees ___ (find) accommodation and employment.
exercises.exp: Assist + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I saw the children ___ (play) in the garden when I looked out of the window.
exercises.exp: See + object + V-ing (đang diễn ra tại thời điểm nhìn)

exercises.q: The strict teacher wouldn't let anyone ___ (leave) the classroom early.
exercises.exp: Let + object + bare infinitive (cho phép)

exercises.q: The company forbids employees ___ (use) their mobile phones during working hours.
exercises.exp: Forbid + object + to-infinitive (cấm)

exercises.q: I heard my neighbour ___ (argue) with someone on the phone late last night.
exercises.exp: Hear + object + V-ing (nghe thấy đang diễn ra)

exercises.q: The professor challenged his students ___ (think) critically about the issue.
exercises.exp: Challenge + object + to-infinitive (thách thức)

exercises.q: We watched the workers ___ (repair) the road outside our house all day.
exercises.exp: Watch + object + V-ing (quan sát đang diễn ra)

exercises.q: The organisation helped us ___ (organise) the fundraising event.
exercises.exp: Help + object + (to) V (có hoặc không to)

exercises.q: My parents always encouraged me ___ (pursue) my dreams no matter what.
exercises.exp: Encourage + object + to-infinitive

He warned them {{3}} their fitness levels or risk being dropped from the team. However, he also encouraged them {{4}} each other and spent hours {{5}} their techniques. The team captain helped younger players {{6}} with the pressure of professional football. The coach once caught two players {{7}} the rules and made them {{8}} extra laps around the field. Despite the strictness, the players trusted him {{9}} the best out of them. Nobody could imagine the team {{10}} without his guidance and leadership.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một người thầy/cô giáo hoặc người hướng dẫn đã ảnh hưởng đến bạn - sử dụng các cấu trúc verb + object + infinitive/gerund để mô tả họ đã khuyến khích, yêu cầu, ngăn cản hoặc giúp bạn làm gì. Sử dụng đa dạng các động từ: encourage, advise, make, let, help, prevent, warn, teach, remind, allow.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Verb + object + to-infinitive; Verb + object + bare infinitive; Verb + object + V-ing
writing_prompts.example: My high school English teacher had a profound impact on my life. She encouraged me to read challenging books and made me believe that I could achieve anything if I worked hard enough. She spent countless hours helping me prepare for exams and taught me to think critically rather than just memorising facts. She wouldn't let me give up when I struggled, and she always reminded me to keep pushing forward. She warned me not to compare myself to others and advised me to focus on my own progress. She allowed me to make mistakes and learn from them, which was perhaps the most valuable lesson of all. I truly believe she helped shape the person I have become today.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) một tình huống khẩn cấp hoặc nguy hiểm bạn đã chứng kiến - sử dụng các động từ chỉ giác quan (see, hear, watch, notice, observe, find, catch) + object + V-ing hoặc bare infinitive để mô tả những gì bạn đã thấy, nghe hoặc chứng kiến. Cố gắng tạo ra một câu chuyện sinh động và chi tiết.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Verbs of perception + object + infinitive/V-ing
writing_prompts.example: Last summer, I witnessed a dramatic rescue at the beach. I was sitting on the sand when I noticed a young boy struggling in the water, his arms waving desperately. I heard someone shouting for help from the shoreline. I watched a lifeguard running towards the water and diving in without a moment's hesitation. I saw him reaching the boy and keeping his head above the waves. Another rescuer joined them, and together I watched them bringing the boy safely back to shore. I heard the boy's mother crying with relief as she thanked the lifeguards. I could feel my own heart racing throughout the entire ordeal. Later, I observed the lifeguards talking calmly to the boy, making sure he was alright before letting him go home with his family.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một quy tắc, nội quy hoặc chính sách ở nơi làm việc hoặc trường học - sử dụng các động từ chỉ yêu cầu, cấm đoán, cho phép (require, forbid, allow, let, make, force, prevent, stop) + object + infinitive/V-ing. Mô tả những gì được phép, không được phép, bị bắt buộc hoặc bị ngăn cản.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Verbs of requirement/permission/prohibition + object + infinitive/V-ing
writing_prompts.example: The company I work for has a strict set of policies that all employees must follow. The policy requires everyone to complete a cybersecurity training module every six months. It forbids employees from using personal devices for work purposes and doesn't allow anyone to install unauthorised software on company computers. The security rules make us change our passwords every thirty days, which can be quite annoying. The open-plan office design encourages people to collaborate, but it also prevents anyone from making private phone calls without being overheard. The management allows staff to work from home twice a week, which most people appreciate. However, the attendance policy forces employees to notify their manager before eight in the morning if they are going to be late or absent. Breaking these rules can result in disciplinary action, so the strict environment makes everyone stay on their toes.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) một dự án nhóm hoặc hoạt động hợp tác - sử dụng các cấu trúc verb + object + infinitive/V-ing để mô tả cách các thành viên trong nhóm đã giúp đỡ, khuyến khích, thuyết phục hoặc ngăn cản nhau. Sử dụng các động từ: help, encourage, persuade, remind, prevent, stop, motivate, challenge, support, urge.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Verb + object + infinitive/V-ing in teamwork context
writing_prompts.example: Working on our final university project was an unforgettable experience that taught me the true value of collaboration. Our team leader encouraged everyone to share their ideas freely, which made us all feel valued and included. She helped us organise our workload efficiently and persuaded the more hesitant members to take on responsibilities they didn't think they could handle. When conflicts arose, she prevented the team from falling apart by facilitating open and honest discussions. The more experienced members spent time teaching the rest of us new skills and motivated us to push beyond our comfort zones. We challenged each other to produce our best work, but we also supported each other through difficult moments. One member stopped the group from making a costly mistake by catching an error in our calculations just in time. The final presentation was a huge success, and our professor later told us that the experience had prepared us well for the professional world.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về việc nuôi dạy con cái hoặc ký ức tuổi thơ - sử dụng các cấu trúc verb + object + infinitive/V-ing để mô tả những gì cha mẹ bạn đã dạy, khuyến khích, bắt buộc, ngăn cản hoặc cho phép bạn làm khi còn nhỏ. So sánh cách nuôi dạy của bạn với cách bạn sẽ nuôi dạy con cái của mình trong tương lai.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Verb + object + infinitive/V-ing in parenting context
writing_prompts.example: Looking back at my childhood, I realise how much my parents shaped my character through their careful guidance. They taught me to be honest even when telling the truth was difficult, and they made me take responsibility for my mistakes. They encouraged me to try different activities, from music to sports, so that I could discover my passions. They wouldn't let me give up on something just because it was hard, but they also allowed me to stop activities that I genuinely disliked. My father spent hours helping me with mathematics, and my mother taught me to cook simple meals. They warned me not to judge people based on appearances and reminded me to be kind to everyone I met. They prevented me from making some serious mistakes by setting clear boundaries, but they also gave me enough freedom to learn from my own experiences. If I ever have children, I hope I can raise them with the same combination of love, discipline, and encouragement that my parents gave me.

upper.title: Gerunds and infinitives: Complex forms
upper.content:
📌 Các dạng phức tạp của Gerund và Infinitive
Ở trình độ B2, chúng ta học cách sử dụng các dạng phức tạp hơn của gerund và infinitive, bao gồm dạng hoàn thành, bị động, và dạng tiếp diễn.

Các dạng này cho phép chúng ta diễn đạt:
✦ Thời gian (quá khứ, hiện tại, tương lai) của hành động
✦ Thể chủ động hay bị động
✦ Trạng thái đang diễn ra hay đã hoàn thành
📌 Bảng các dạng Gerund & Infinitive
DạngActivePassive
Infinitive (hiện tại)to Vto be V3
Infinitive (tiếp diễn)to be V-ing—
Infinitive (hoàn thành)to have V3to have been V3
Infinitive (hoàn thành tiếp diễn)to have been V-ing—
Gerund (hiện tại)V-ingbeing V3
Gerund (hoàn thành)having V3having been V3
📌 Khi nào dùng dạng phức tạp?
1. Perfect Infinitive (to have V3) – dùng sau các động từ:
claim, appear, seem, pretend, happen, prove, be said, be believed
He claims to have met the president. (Anh ta tự nhận đã gặp tổng thống)
She seems to have forgotten our appointment. (Cô ấy dường như đã quên cuộc hẹn)

2. Perfect Gerund (having V3) – dùng sau giới từ hoặc một số động từ:
admit, deny, regret, remember, forget, apologise for, thank for, accuse of
He admitted having stolen the car. (Anh ta thừa nhận đã ăn trộm xe)
She regrets not having studied harder. (Cô ấy hối tiếc đã không học chăm hơn)

3. Passive Gerund (being V3) – dùng khi chủ ngữ nhận hành động:
I hate being told what to do. (Tôi ghét bị bảo phải làm gì)
He can't stand being ignored. (Anh ta không chịu được bị phớt lờ)

4. Passive Infinitive (to be V3) – dùng khi chủ ngữ nhận hành động:
She wants to be respected. (Cô ấy muốn được tôn trọng)
The report needs to be completed by Friday. (Báo cáo cần được hoàn thành trước thứ Sáu)
📌 So sánh: Các dạng khác nhau của Gerund
CâuÝ nghĩa
I regret telling him.Hối tiếc về việc đã nói (cùng thời gian hoặc sau)
I regret having told him.Hối tiếc về việc đã nói (nhấn mạnh việc đã xảy ra trước đó)
I remember being taken to the zoo.Nhớ việc được đưa đi vườn thú (bị động)
I remember having been taken to the zoo.Nhớ việc đã được đưa đi vườn thú (bị động + nhấn mạnh quá khứ)
He claims to have been offered the job, but I find that hard to believe.Perfect passive infinitive: to have been + V3
I appreciate being given the opportunity to work on this project.Passive gerund: being + V3
She denied having been involved in the scandal.Perfect passive gerund: having been + V3

exercises.q: He claims ___ the president at a private dinner last year.
exercises.exp: Perfect infinitive: to have V3 (hành động xảy ra trước)

exercises.q: She seems ___ her keys somewhere in the office.
exercises.exp: Perfect infinitive: to have V3 (đã mất)

exercises.q: I regret ___ him the truth about what happened.
exercises.opts: not telling,to not tell,not to tell,not having tell
exercises.exp: Regret + V-ing (hối tiếc về việc đã làm/không làm) / having V3

exercises.q: He admitted ___ the money from the safe.
exercises.exp: Admit + V-ing / having V3 (thừa nhận đã làm)

exercises.q: I hate ___ what to do by people who don't understand the situation.
exercises.exp: Hate + passive gerund (being V3) = ghét bị làm gì

exercises.q: She wants ___ as a serious professional in her field.
exercises.exp: Want + passive infinitive: to be V3 (muốn được tôn trọng)

exercises.q: I'm sorry ___ you waiting. The meeting ran late.
exercises.exp: Sorry + perfect infinitive: to have V3 (xin lỗi về việc đã làm)

exercises.q: She denied ___ any involvement in the scandal.
exercises.exp: Deny + V-ing / having V3 (phủ nhận)

exercises.q: Thank you ___ me with the project last month.
exercises.opts: for having helped,to have helped,for helping,to help
exercises.exp: Thank for + V-ing / having V3

exercises.q: The report needs ___ before the end of the day.
exercises.exp: Passive infinitive after need: to be V3

exercises.q: He can't stand ___ when he's trying to concentrate.
exercises.exp: Can't stand + passive gerund: being V3

exercises.q: I recall ___ the door before I left the house this morning.
exercises.exp: Recall + V-ing / having V3 (nhớ đã làm gì)

exercises.q: She appears ___ a lot of weight since I last saw her.
exercises.exp: Appear + perfect infinitive: to have V3

exercises.q: They were accused ___ confidential documents.
exercises.opts: of having stolen,to have stolen,of stealing,having stolen
exercises.exp: Accuse of + V-ing / having V3 (bị buộc tội đã làm)

exercises.q: The children are excited about ___ to the circus tomorrow.
exercises.exp: About + passive gerund: being V3 (hào hứng về việc được đưa đi)

exercises.q: He is believed ___ the country before the police arrived.
exercises.exp: Passive reporting verb + perfect infinitive: believed to have V3

exercises.q: I don't remember ___ by that doctor when I was a child.
exercises.exp: Remember + passive gerund (nhớ đã được làm gì)

exercises.q: The politician was accused ___ bribes from foreign companies.
exercises.opts: of having accepted,to have accepted,accepting,to accept
exercises.exp: Accuse + of + having V3 (bị cáo buộc đã làm)

exercises.q: It's a privilege ___ to speak at this prestigious conference.
exercises.opts: to have been invited,to be invited,being invited,having invited
exercises.exp: Perfect passive infinitive: to have been V3 (đã được mời)

exercises.q: There's no point in ___ after what's already happened.
exercises.exp: There's no point in + V-ing

exercises.q: He claims ___ (meet) the Queen at a charity event last year.
exercises.exp: Perfect infinitive: to have V3 (hành động đã xảy ra)

exercises.q: She seems ___ (forget) about our meeting this afternoon.
exercises.exp: Seem + perfect infinitive: dường như đã quên

exercises.q: I regret ___ (not / study) harder when I was at university.
exercises.exp: Regret + having V3 / V-ing (hối tiếc)

exercises.q: The suspect admitted ___ (take) the money from the office safe.
exercises.exp: Admit + having V3 / V-ing (thừa nhận)

exercises.q: I hate ___ (tell) what to do all the time by my supervisor.
exercises.exp: Passive gerund after hate: being V3 (ghét bị bảo)

exercises.q: She wants ___ (respect) by her colleagues and superiors.
exercises.exp: Passive infinitive after want: to be V3

exercises.q: I'm sorry ___ (keep) you waiting so long.
exercises.exp: Sorry + perfect infinitive: to have V3

exercises.q: The accused denied ___ (be) anywhere near the scene of the crime.
exercises.exp: Deny + having V3 / V-ing (phủ nhận)

exercises.q: Thank you ___ (help) us with the fundraising event last weekend.
exercises.exp: Thank for + having V3 / V-ing

exercises.q: The report needs ___ (complete) before the deadline on Friday.
exercises.exp: Passive infinitive after need: to be V3

exercises.q: He can't stand ___ (ignore) when he's trying to make a point.
exercises.exp: Passive gerund after can't stand: being V3

exercises.q: I recall ___ (lock) the front door before I left for work.
exercises.exp: Recall + V-ing / having V3 (nhớ đã làm)

exercises.q: She appears ___ (lose) a considerable amount of weight recently.
exercises.exp: Appear + perfect infinitive: to have V3

exercises.q: The employee was accused ___ (steal) company property.
exercises.exp: Accuse + of + having V3 / V-ing

exercises.q: The children are looking forward to ___ (take) to the amusement park.
exercises.exp: Look forward to + passive gerund: being V3

exercises.q: The fugitive is believed ___ (leave) the country before the arrest warrant was issued.
exercises.exp: Believed + perfect infinitive: to have V3

exercises.q: I don't remember ___ (tell) about the change in schedule.
exercises.exp: Passive gerund: không nhớ đã được thông báo

exercises.q: The politician was accused ___ (accept) illegal campaign donations.
exercises.exp: Accuse of + having V3 / V-ing

exercises.q: It's a great honour ___ (choose) to represent our country at the Olympics.
exercises.ans: to have been chosen / to be chosen
exercises.exp: Perfect passive infinitive: to have been V3

exercises.q: There's no point ___ (worry) about things you cannot control.
exercises.exp: There's no point in + V-ing (không có ích gì khi làm gì)

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một quyết định trong quá khứ mà bạn hối tiếc - sử dụng các dạng gerund/infinitive phức tạp như: regret + having V3, admit + having V3, should have V3, wish I had V3, và các dạng bị động như being V3, to have been V3. Mô tả chi tiết điều gì đã xảy ra, tại sao bạn đưa ra quyết định đó và bài học bạn đã rút ra.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Perfect gerund (having V3), perfect infinitive (to have V3), passive gerund (being V3)
writing_prompts.example: Looking back, I deeply regret having chosen to study a subject that I never truly loved simply because I was afraid of disappointing my parents. I now admit having wasted several years pursuing a career path that was never right for me. I remember being told by my teachers that I had potential in creative fields, but I ignored their advice. I can't stand being trapped in a job that doesn't fulfil me, and I hate having been too afraid to follow my instincts when I had the chance to change direction. I wish I had taken a gap year to explore my options rather than rushing into a decision that I would later regret. However, I am grateful for having learned this important lesson, and I have finally decided to retrain in a field that I am truly passionate about. I refuse to spend the rest of my life wondering what might have been.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) một thành tích hoặc điều gì đó bạn tự hào - sử dụng các dạng phức tạp của gerund/infinitive như: be proud of having V3, be honoured to have been V3, claim to have V3, appear to have V3, seem to have V3, be said to have V3. Thể hiện niềm tự hào của bạn về những gì bạn đã đạt được.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Perfect infinitive/gerund for achievements; passive forms
writing_prompts.example: I am incredibly proud of having completed my first marathon last year after months of intensive training. I remember being told by many people that I was too old to start long-distance running, but I refused to let their doubts stop me. Crossing the finish line after forty-two kilometres was an emotional moment that I will never forget. I feel honoured to have been part of such an incredible event alongside thousands of other runners. People who knew me before I started running claim to have noticed a significant change in my confidence and discipline. I seem to have discovered a resilience within myself that I never knew existed. My family is proud of me, not just for finishing the race, but for having set a goal and persevering until I achieved it. I now appear to have inspired a few friends to take up running themselves, which fills me with a sense of purpose. Having overcome the challenge of a marathon, I feel ready to tackle whatever life throws at me next.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một vụ án hình sự hoặc bê bối nổi tiếng - sử dụng các dạng phức tạp của gerund/infinitive (đặc biệt là bị động và hoàn thành) để tường thuật các sự kiện: is believed to have V3, is accused of having V3, is said to have been V3, denies having V3, admits having V3. Tạo một câu chuyện hấp dẫn về một vụ án có thật hoặc hư cấu.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Complex passive forms of gerunds and infinitives in crime reporting
writing_prompts.example: A prominent art dealer has been arrested on suspicion of having sold counterfeit paintings to wealthy collectors for over a decade. He is believed to have earned millions of dollars from the scheme, which involved commissioning convincing forgeries of works by famous artists. The dealer is accused of having deceived some of the world's most respected galleries and art experts. He denies having knowingly participated in any illegal activity, claiming to have been deceived himself by the forgers. However, investigators claim to have found evidence that the dealer was fully aware of what he was doing. He appears to have maintained an elaborate system of fake provenance documents that fooled even experienced experts. Several collectors now regret having spent enormous sums on what they believed were genuine masterpieces. The dealer is said to have been living a lavish lifestyle funded entirely by the profits of the fraud. He is known to have owned multiple properties, a yacht, and a private art collection worth millions. If convicted, he faces a lengthy prison sentence and will be remembered as one of the most sophisticated art fraudsters in modern history.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả (trên 40 từ) cảm xúc của bạn về một tình huống cụ thể (ví dụ: bị đối xử bất công, bị phớt lờ, bị đánh giá thấp) - sử dụng các dạng bị động của gerund và infinitive: being V3, to be V3, to have been V3, having been V3. Diễn tả chi tiết cảm xúc và suy nghĩ của bạn về trải nghiệm đó.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive gerund and passive infinitive forms for expressing emotions
writing_prompts.example: I have always hated being underestimated simply because of my age, and I can distinctly remember being overlooked for a promotion despite having the best results in my department. The worst part was being told by my manager that I 'wasn't ready yet' without any specific reasons being given. I resented being judged on assumptions rather than my actual performance. For months, I felt frustrated at being passed over while less qualified colleagues were given opportunities that should have been mine. However, I refused to accept being treated unfairly without a fight. I spent the next year working harder than ever, documenting every achievement and developing new skills. Eventually, I was called to a meeting and was surprised at being offered a more senior position than the one I had originally applied for. Looking back, I appreciate having been challenged in that way because it forced me to prove my worth. I am no longer afraid of being underestimated; in fact, I now see it as motivation to exceed expectations.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết (trên 40 từ) về một trải nghiệm du lịch hoặc phiêu lưu đáng nhớ - sử dụng các dạng phức tạp của gerund/infinitive để mô tả những điều bạn nhớ, hối tiếc, tự hào hoặc cảm thấy may mắn đã trải qua. Sử dụng: remember having V3, regret not having V3, am glad to have V3, was lucky to have been V3, recall being V3, can't imagine having V3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Complex gerund/infinitive forms in travel and adventure storytelling
writing_prompts.example: Travelling through Southeast Asia alone was the most transformative experience of my life, and I still recall having the most incredible feeling of freedom the first time I stepped off the plane in a country where I knew nobody and spoke barely a word of the language. I remember being completely overwhelmed during my first week, but I am so glad to have pushed through that initial discomfort. I regret not having learned more of the local language before I went, as I think I missed out on deeper connections with the people I met. However, I consider myself incredibly fortunate to have visited places that most tourists never see, and I was lucky to have been invited into a local family's home for a traditional meal. I will never forget being welcomed with such warmth and generosity by complete strangers. I can't imagine having had the same experiences if I had travelled with a group or stayed in resorts. Looking back, I am proud of having stepped so far outside my comfort zone. That trip taught me more about myself than years of formal education ever could, and I feel deeply grateful to have had the opportunity to see the world from such a different perspective.
